title: 无标题文章
summary: Preparing my talk for Droidcon Berlin, and I'd like to know your favourite quotes on testing Android/Kotlin applications, the funnier, the better! Perhaps from influential people in the community, or your own team members… Or if you'd just like to give your 2c on the matter 😜
content:
Preparing my talk for Droidcon Berlin, and I'd like to know your favourite quotes on testing Android/Kotlin applications, the funnier, the better!

Perhaps from influential people in the community, or your own team members…

Or if you'd just like to give your 2c on the matter 😜
